positive: A symmetrical, geometric pattern featuring stylized, blooming celestial flora and abstract celestial bodies, rendered in a sophisticated Art Deco aesthetic. The composition should be highly centralized and balanced, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Use a restricted color palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, cream, and matte gold accents. Strong contrast is key. The design must maintain clean, crisp silhouettes with visible line work, evoking a vintage travel poster mixed with modern minimalism. Graphic vector art style, high detail, solid black lines on a light background. --ar 1:1
